title: Petrus Resources Announces Renewal of Normal Course Issuer Bid
body: CALGARY, Alberta, June 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) — Petrus Resources Ltd. (“Petrus“) (TSX: PRQ) is pleased to announce that the Toronto Stock Exchange (the “TSX“) has accepted Petrus’ notice of intention to renew its normal course issuer bid (the “NCIB“). The NCIB allows Petrus to purchase up to 7,424,183 common shares (representing 5% of Petrus’ [Read more]
